summary: Test architecture now keeps subjective Skill judgment out of hard-coded word-list assertions: core tests are narrow, CLI source boundary lives in module-boundaries, and Skill description tests check discovery metadata shape rather than judging AC quality.

sources.label: opennori-self-ac-p-15-subjective-test-boundary
sources.summary: Architecture Baseline alignment context. This is not Product AC evidence by itself.

sources.label: npx vitest run test/core.test.js test/docs-schema.test.js test/module-boundaries.test.js
sources.command: npx vitest run test/core.test.js test/docs-schema.test.js test/module-boundaries.test.js

reviewability: Review test/core.test.js, test/docs-schema.test.js, test/module-boundaries.test.js, docs/testing.md, and docs/skill-evals.md; rerun focused tests plus lint/typecheck/check.
limitations: This verifies the automated test boundary. It does not evaluate whether a live agent will generate strong AC in a real user conversation; that remains covered by Skill dogfood evals.
